title: Pixel8ed (f8thful Addon)
description: Changes some blocks and items to better match vanilla Minecraft with F8thful resource pack
body:
This resource pack changes the tools, weapons, food, armor, ingredients and block items from the F8thful resource pack to make them look more vanilla, instead of just downscaling the resolution of the item textures. All handmade.

This resource package is intended to be used with the amazing [F8thful resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/f8thful).

Make sure you place this resource pack above the F8thful resource pack.

The armor items are inspired by [Punchy 8x8 Texture Pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/punchy-8x8-texture-pack/).

Thank you all for downloading and following this project!!
